languages.text: ну ты мразь канеш кинул меня

traits.locale_text: ну ты мразь канеш кинул меня

languages.text: Тело Эоганна небрежно свалено среди отбросов. Металлическое брюхо вскрыто, часть аугментов болтается на проводах, а плоть испещрена надрезами. Голова отсутствует — ее извлекли вместе с частью хребта.

Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.
languages.original_text: Тело Эоганна небрежно свалено среди отбросов. Металлическое брюхо вскрыто, часть аугментов болтается на проводах, а плоть испещрена надрезами. Голова отсутствует — ее извлекли вместе с частью хребта.

languages.text: El cuerpo de Eogunn ha sido desechado entre la basura. Su abdomen metálico ha sido abierto por fuerza, hay algunos auméticos que cuelgan de sus cables y la piel está llena de incisiones. Falta su cabeza, que ha sido extraída junto con parte de la columna vertebral.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.

traits.locale_text: El cuerpo de Eogunn ha sido desechado entre la basura. Su abdomen metálico ha sido abierto por fuerza, hay algunos auméticos que cuelgan de sus cables y la piel está llena de incisiones. Falta su cabeza, que ha sido extraída junto con parte de la columna vertebral.

languages.text: Le corps d'Eogunn a été jeté sans ménagement parmi les ordures. Son abdomen métallique a été ouvert, certains augmétiques pendent au bout de leurs fils, et sa peau est couverte d'incisions. Sa tête a disparu, de même qu'une partie de sa colonne vertébrale.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.

traits.locale_text: Le corps d'Eogunn a été jeté sans ménagement parmi les ordures. Son abdomen métallique a été ouvert, certains augmétiques pendent au bout de leurs fils, et sa peau est couverte d'incisions. Sa tête a disparu, de même qu'une partie de sa colonne vertébrale.

languages.text: 伊奥贡的尸体被人随手丢在垃圾堆里。他的金属腹部被剖开，部分植入物随导线垂下，皮肤布满切口。他的头颅连同部分脊椎不翼而飞。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡的尸体被人随手丢在垃圾堆里。他的金属腹部被剖开，部分植入物随导线垂下，皮肤布满切口。他的头颅连同部分脊椎不翼而飞。

languages.text: Eogunns Leiche wurde achtlos auf den Müll geworfen. Sein metallener Oberkörper wurde geöffnet, einige Augmentationen hängen noch an ihren Kabeln und seine Haut ist mit Einschnitten übersät. Sein Kopf fehlt. Er wurde mit einem Teil des Rückgrates abgetrennt.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.

traits.locale_text: Eogunns Leiche wurde achtlos auf den Müll geworfen. Sein metallener Oberkörper wurde geöffnet, einige Augmentationen hängen noch an ihren Kabeln und seine Haut ist mit Einschnitten übersät. Sein Kopf fehlt. Er wurde mit einem Teil des Rückgrates abgetrennt.

languages.text: Eogunn'un cesedi, dikkatsizce çöplerin arasına atılmış. Metalik karnı yarılmış, bazı ogmetikler kablolarından sarkıyor ve derisi kesiklerle kaplı. Başı yok... Omurganın bir kısmıyla birlikte çıkarılmış.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn'un cesedi, dikkatsizce çöplerin arasına atılmış. Metalik karnı yarılmış, bazı ogmetikler kablolarından sarkıyor ve derisi kesiklerle kaplı. Başı yok... Omurganın bir kısmıyla birlikte çıkarılmış.

languages.text: エオガンの体が、ごみの中に無造作に放り捨てられている。金属の腹部は切り開かれ、いくつかのオーグメティックが配線でぶら下がり、皮膚は切開の跡で覆われている。頭部は失われ、脊椎の一部もろとも取り去られている。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's body is carelessly dumped among the refuse. His metallic abdomen has been cut open, some augmetics dangle by their wires, and his skin is covered in incisions. His head is missing, removed along with part of the spine.
